title: Warpstones
description: Place Warpstones at key locations to create fast-travel points in your world!
body:
# 🌍 Warpstones

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/warpstones?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/warpstones)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Cb2W5DzEnbc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

## 📖 Description

Place Warpstones at key locations to create fast-travel points in your world. Designed for both survival and multiplayer gameplay, this mod offers a simple and balanced way to move around quickly!

### Feactures

- Custom Name (with name tags)
- Glowing (with glowstone dust)
- Compass Linking

I recommend use a [Lodestone Recipe Backport](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lodestone-update-backport) to use a iron ingot instead of netherite ingot.  

<hr>

## 🛠️ Recipe

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/C7TvGcL.png)

<hr>

## ⌨️ Commands

Destroy all Warpstones:

```mcfunction
/function warpstones:destroy_all_warpstones
```

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot warpstones:warpstone
```

<hr>
